meta_process_hacks_v4.double_modulation_trick: Modulate the LFO_1 Rate by LFO_2 (Sine 1/1 bar) for shifting rhythmic syncopation.
meta_process_hacks_v4.spectral_freeze_tail: Use audio__apply_effect(Reverb: Room=1.0, Damping=0.0) on a 100ms slice to create an infinite drone.
meta_process_hacks_v4.phase_inversion_widener: Invert phase of the delay-feedback (Left channel only) for 180° spatial expansion.
meta_process_hacks_v4.kick_sidechain_ghost: Trigger sidechain from a silent 'ghost' kick for more surgical control over Bass-envelope.
